channel.title: Selfhelp on Zymacs
channel.description: Recent content in Selfhelp on Zymacs

item.title: An attempt to focus
item.description:
If you look around my blog you will see a lot of articles. Not so many but year, many in some sense.

The problem.

Many topics. Its hard to tell what I am into. If you asked me, I would’t really have a ready made answer. Actually, now that I think of what answer I’d have for the question, one comes to mind: I want it all.

But then I have a “Hire Me” button in the footer. “Hire Me” for…
